meta.title: 全球化与本土化
meta.description: Upper-intermediate globalization and localization vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: multinational corporations, cultural export, and homogenization.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 중급~중상급 세계화·현지화 어휘와 문형: 다국적 기업, 문화 수출, 동질화.

questions.prompt: 「全球化」是什么意思？(What does 全球化 mean?)
「本土化」是什么意思？(What does 本土化 mean?)
「跨国公司」是什么意思？(What does 跨国公司 mean?)
「文化输出」是什么意思？(What does 文化输出 mean?)
「同质化」是什么意思？(What does 同质化 mean?)
___的深入发展让世界各国的联系更加紧密。(The deepening development of globalization has made connections between countries closer.)
这家跨国企业非常重视产品的___，以适应当地市场需求。(This multinational enterprise places great importance on product localization to adapt to local market demands.)
这家___在全球一百多个国家和地区都有分公司。(This multinational corporation has branches in over a hundred countries and regions worldwide.)
近年来，中国的影视作品越来越受欢迎，促进了___。(In recent years, Chinese films and TV shows have become increasingly popular, promoting cultural export.)
全球化虽然带来了便利，但也导致了一定程度的文化___。(Although globalization has brought convenience, it has also led to a certain degree of cultural homogenization.)
尽管全球化趋势不可逆转，___各国依然努力保护本土文化。(Although the trend of globalization is irreversible, countries still work hard to protect local culture.)
无论是发达国家还是发展中国家，___受到全球化的深刻影响。(Whether developed or developing countries, all are deeply affected by globalization.)
除非企业做好本土化调整，___很难在海外市场获得成功。(Unless companies make proper localization adjustments, it's hard to succeed in overseas markets.)
这家企业之所以能在国际市场站稳脚跟，___是因为做好了本土化策略。(This enterprise was able to gain a firm foothold in the international market precisely because it did localization strategy well.)

explanation.en: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」means "on one hand 〜, on the other hand 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」는 '한편으로는 ~, 다른 한편으로는 ~'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一方面企业要拓展全球市场，___方面也要尊重当地文化差异。(On one hand enterprises need to expand into global markets, on the other hand they also need to respect local cultural differences.)
这个品牌___了本地元素，赢得了消费者的认可。(This brand incorporated local elements, winning consumer recognition.)
全球化___了国家间的经济往来，也带来了新的挑战。(Globalization promoted economic exchanges between countries, but also brought new challenges.)
面对全球化浪潮，很多传统行业不得不寻求___。(Facing the wave of globalization, many traditional industries had to seek transformation.)
这个国际品牌___了当地消费者的饮食习惯，调整了产品配方。(This international brand studied local consumers' eating habits, adjusting its product formula.)
全球化时代，掌握多种语言可以___个人的竞争力。(In the era of globalization, mastering multiple languages can enhance an individual's competitiveness.)

explanation.en: 「的」must come between 各国 and 联系 to form the correct noun phrase: 世界各国的联系 (not 世界联系各国).
explanation.ko: 「的」는 '各国'과 '联系' 사이에 와서 올바른 명사구를 만들어야 하므로 '世界各国的联系'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 全球化的深入发展让世界联系各国更加紧密。(The deepening development of globalization has made connections between countries closer.) — find the error
choices: 全球化的深入发展让世界各国的联系更加紧密。
全球化的深入发展让世界联系各国更加紧密。
全球化的深入发展让联系世界各国更加紧密。
全球化的深入发展让世界各国更加紧密联系。

explanation.en: 「否则」must come at the start of the second clause, before 很难: 否则很难〜 (not 很难否则〜).
explanation.ko: 「否则」는 두 번째 절의 맨 앞, '很难' 앞에 와야 하므로 '否则很难〜'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 无论是发达国家还是发展中国家，都受到全球化的深刻影响。(Whether developed or developing countries, all are deeply affected by globalization.) — this is correct, use another: 除非企业做好本土化调整，很难否则在海外市场获得成功。(Unless companies make proper localization adjustments, it's hard to succeed in overseas markets.) — find the error
choices: 除非企业做好本土化调整，否则很难在海外市场获得成功。
除非企业做好本土化调整，很难否则在海外市场获得成功。
除非企业做好本土化调整，否则在海外市场很难获得成功。
除非企业做好本土化调整，很难在海外市场否则获得成功。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这家企业之所以能在国际市场站稳脚跟，因为是做好了本土化策略。(This enterprise was able to gain a firm foothold in the international market precisely because it did localization strategy well.) — find the error
choices: 这家企业之所以能在国际市场站稳脚跟，是因为做好了本土化策略。
这家企业之所以能在国际市场站稳脚跟，因为是做好了本土化策略。
这家企业之所以能在国际市场站稳脚跟，是做好因为了本土化策略。
这家企业之所以能在国际市场站稳脚跟，做好是因为了本土化策略。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 全球化的深入发展让世界各国的联系更加紧密 ("The deepening development of globalization has made connections between countries closer").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '全球化的深入发展让世界各国的联系更加紧密' (세계화의 심화 발전은 세계 각국의 연결을 더욱 긴밀하게 만들었다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 全球化的深入发展__________。(The deepening development of globalization has made connections between countries closer.)
words: 让世界各国的联系更加紧密
questions.answer: 让世界各国的联系更加紧密

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 除非企业做好本土化调整，否则很难在海外市场获得成功 ("Unless companies make proper localization adjustments, it's hard to succeed in overseas markets").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '除非企业做好本土化调整，否则很难在海外市场获得成功' (기업이 현지화 조정을 잘하지 않는 한, 해외 시장에서 성공하기 어렵다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 除非企业做好本土化调整，__________在海外市场获得成功。(Unless companies make proper localization adjustments, it's hard to succeed in overseas markets.)
